masterPrompt: Mythic Natural Realism, cinematic square environmental artwork with tactile stone, weather, water, roots, and living light. Create one master composition for node body.stamina.physical-endurance; all five capacity states will be deterministic treatments of this exact Recraft scene, so do not encode a capacity state or warning tint in the composition itself. Prompt intent: Show bodily endurance as durable flow that divides and recombines around resistance while the parent ascent remains unmistakable. Universal human-capacity force: braided glacier streams carrying force across a broad stone shelf. This identity is universal and independent of any aim, goal, profession, or sport. Fractal family: self-similar living mountain watershed; root ridges resolving into vascular river deltas; long contour lines flowing through resilient root fibres; parallel meltwater channels recombining after every obstacle. Parent geometry must visibly become child geography rather than a separate icon or panel. Inherited parent visual DNA: edge: living convergence of breath, tide, stone, canopy, weather, and relationship; self-similar living mountain watershed; anchor a luminous watershed spiral held at the living mountain heart | body: tectonic vitality; self-similar living mountain watershed; root ridges resolving into vascular river deltas; anchor a forked river vein crossing a basalt ridge | body.stamina: sustained mountain current; self-similar living mountain watershed; root ridges resolving into vascular river deltas; long contour lines flowing through resilient root fibres; anchor a continuous root line climbing the ridge without breaking. Transition anchor: preserve and clarify the climbing root line widening into three braided channels across the ridge. Neutral master palette: basalt black, lichen green, pearl grey, glacial white, warm natural gold, balanced full tonal range suitable for later cool, clear, amber, and controlled-crimson grading. Accessibility purpose: Describe the body.stamina.physical-endurance environment as a non-diagnostic natural process whose identity and capacity state remain understandable without relying on colour. Pipeline intent 2.0.0: Generate one universal, text-free Mythic Natural Realism composition whose inherited landmark remains spatially stable across all deterministic capacity-state treatments. Single immersive natural world, inspectable detail, coherent central landmark, no decorative bokeh, no gradient blobs. No embedded text, numbers, or logos. No interface, cards, frames, badges, charts, people, faces, medical symbols, diagnoses, or aim-specific objects.
